data.title: House passes Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act, blocks digital dollar rollout
data.description:
The U. S. House passed the Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act, prohibiting the Federal Reserve from issuing or testing a digital dollar without Congressional approval. Here's what it means.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/house-passes-anti-cbdc-surveillance-state-act-blocks-digital-dollar-rollout

data.title: BlackRock Files With SEC to Include Staking in Ethereum ETF
data.description:
BlackRock aims to include staking in its spot Ethereum ETF, according to a rules change request filed to the SEC.
source: https://decrypt.co/330679/blackrock-files-sec-include-staking-ethereum-etf

data.title: U.S. House Passes Major Crypto Bills
data.description:
The historic stablecoin regulation and market structure acts have passed the House, moving to the President’s desk.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/u-s-house-passes-major-crypto-bills

data.title: House Passes GENIUS Act, Awaiting Trump's Signature
data.description:
GENIUS Act clears U. S. House, marking a pivotal step in stablecoin regulation, pending Trump's signature.
source: https://coincu.com/349262-genius-act-stablecoin-regulation-2

data.title: Bitcoin-backed mortgages debut in Australia amid housing crisis
data.description:
Australia’s Block Earner has launched a Bitcoin-backed mortgage as a new path into the property market, following a regulatory win that cleared the way for crypto-backed lending.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-backed-mortgages-australia-housing-crisis?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Rep. Maxine Waters Doubles Down On Crypto Legislation Crypto Criticism
data.description:
Maxine Waters has opposed the CLARITY Act in a new press release, calling it the 'CALAMITY Act' and warning it would cause investor harm as part of her Anti-Crypto Corruption Week initiative. Waters has also questioned Trump's crypto ties and conflicts of interest The post Rep.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/rep-maxine-waters-doubles-down-on-crypto-legislation-crypto-crticism/

data.title: Congress moves forward on digital asset regulations with GENIUS, CLARITY Acts
data.description:
The House passed the GENIUS Act in a 307‑122 vote and sent the bill to President Donald Trump, who plans to sign it at a White House ceremony tomorrow, according to Galaxy head of research Alex Thorn.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/congress-moves-forward-on-digital-asset-regulations-with-genius-clarity-acts/

data.title: SUI Triangle Tightens, AVAX Holds $20, While BlockDAG Buyer Battles Draw Fresh Eyes Before GLOBAL LAUNCH Release
data.description:
The summer trading season continues to unfold with price shifts and potential breakout setups across major cryptocurrencies. Market watchers are keeping a close eye on how the AVAX chart analysis points to recovery signs, while the SUI technical analysis outlines a tightening price pattern near a possible breakout. Meanwhile, BlockDAG (BDAG) is drawing growing attention. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/sui-triangle-tightens-avax-holds-20-while-blockdag-buyer-battles-draw-fresh-eyes-before-global-launch-release/

data.title: Bitcoin Sees Influx Of New Capital: First-Time Buyers Add 140,000 BTC
data.description:
On-chain data shows the supply held by new Bitcoin buyers has seen a jump recently, a sign that the latest price rally is backed by fresh capital. First-Time Bitcoin Buyers Have Increased Supply By 2. 86% In a new post on X, the on-chain analytics firm Glassnode has talked about the latest trend in the Bitcoin ‘First Buyers. ’ This cohort is part of Glassnode’s broader investor classification system that is based on behavior
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-influx-new-capital-first-buyers-140000-btc/

data.title: Canary continues altcoin ETF strategy with application to launch Injective fund with sataking
data.description:
Canary Capital has filed with the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission to launch the first-ever staked Injective (INJ) exchange-traded fund, aiming to provide institutional investors with regulated access to native on-chain yield
source: https://cryptoslate.com/canary-continues-altcoin-etf-strategy-with-application-to-launch-injective-fund-with-sataking/
